title: Heat Rotom Battle Guide
summary: An [Electric]/[Fire] special pivot with [levitate] — ignores [Ground] attacks and pressures [Steel]/[Water] walls with [overheat] and [thunderbolt].
strengths: 105 SpA with 86 Speed is a strong pivot profile

recommendedMoves.reason: Max BP [Fire] STAB with SpA drop

bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Heat Rotom is an [Electric]/[Fire] special pivot whose [levitate] ability makes it completely immune to [Ground] attacks. With only two weaknesses ([Water] and [Rock]) and four 4x resistances, it has one of the cleanest defensive profiles in the format while still hitting hard offensively.

## Strengths
[levitate] plus the [Electric]/[Fire] typing creates an incredible defensive checklist — [Bug], [Ice], [Steel], [Grass] all resisted 4x, [Ground] immune, plus seven other resistances. 105 Special Attack is strong enough to threaten offensive plays, and [volt-switch] makes Heat Rotom a reliable pivot.

## Weaknesses & Answers
50 HP is the weak point — even with 107/107 defenses, super-effective hits can KO. [Water] attackers pressure it heavily, as do [Rock] moves. [mold-breaker] users bypass [levitate] and can land [earthquake].

## Recommended Moveset
[overheat] is the main [Fire] STAB but has a SpA drop. [thunderbolt] is the reliable [Electric] STAB. [volt-switch] enables pivot plays. [protect] is standard.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[choice-specs] maximizes offensive damage. [choice-scarf] turns Heat Rotom into a speed pivot. [levitate] is locked — losing it breaks the defensive plan. Tera [Fire] or [Electric] stacks STAB.

## Teammates & Synergy
Cover [Water] and [Rock] with [Grass] or [Fighting] partners. Pivot cores benefit from [volt-switch] momentum. [intimidate] support adds physical bulk.

## Play Patterns
Switch in on predicted [Ground] moves to bait [earthquake] misses. Pressure [Steel] and [Water] walls with [overheat] and [thunderbolt]. Use [volt-switch] to reset the SpA drop from [overheat] and maintain pivot momentum.
